parsed_output.ticket: I was charged twice this month and your support team has not replied for five days. I am going to post this on social media if this is not fixed today.
parsed_output.justification: Customer reports duplicate charges and a prolonged lack of response, indicating a critical billing problem.

parsed_output.ticket: The export button stopped working after your latest update. Our reporting team is blocked.
parsed_output.justification: Core export functionality is broken after an update, preventing essential reporting tasks.

parsed_output.ticket: Can you add approval workflows before invoices are submitted?
parsed_output.justification: Customer is requesting a new workflow capability for invoice approvals.

parsed_output.ticket: We need confirmation that our customer data is not being used to train your AI models.
parsed_output.justification: Customer seeks assurance about data usage and AI training, a compliance‑related concern.

parsed_output.ticket: My admin account is locked and the password reset email never arrives.
parsed_output.justification: User is completely blocked from admin access with no password reset email, requiring immediate resolution.
